title: Fix ActionQueue race-prone surface area — add lock protection to all operations
description:
From sprint35_audit finding 8 (80% confidence): ActionQueue uses ConcurrentQueue, but only some operations are lock-protected. Enqueue, Dequeue, Peek, Clear, Count, and IsEmpty are all independently callable, so higher-level callers can observe stale or inconsistent queue state around clears and bulk enqueues.

Fix: Add consistent lock protection to all queue operations so the abstraction is fully coherent for concurrent readers/writers.

Source: sprint35_audit (Finding 8)

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body: Deferred from Sprint 49 Wave B — requires lock protection audit across all ActionQueue operations. See handoff.
